name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Today's announcement...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Cory's right, this team does have a habit of coming together to reach our goals. And most of the time? _We blow right by them._ That's why this morning we set a grassroots goal -- $725,000 by October 31st at 11:59 p.m. -- to help us capitalize on the investments we've made. I'll let the Boss explain, so check out his note below and then chip in here (**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191024_AD_20191024-fr-AD-eombump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**) to get us closer to reaching yet another goal. Let's go,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Our monthly fundraising deadline next week is a very big deal, friend. Here's why: **Voters will start weighing in come February, just 102 days from today.** Because we hit our ambitious grassroots fundraising goal last month, we were able to make critical investments in key early states. But we need to keep growing if we're going to win. Right now, our organizing team is pulling a lot of late nights gearing up for the home stretch, and they need reinforcements. Plans are in motion -- now, the question is whether those organizers will have the resources to make the most of these last 100 days. That's what this deadline is all about. And I'm hoping everyone reading this email can do a small part to help -- **so today I'm announcing a goal of raising $725,000 before the end of the month.** **Will you chip in a donation today to help reach our grassroots goal before the October deadline?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191024_AD_20191024-fr-AD-eombump-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

Cory

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0af1/5fca0d19/76c1d9c6/291c20e7/1240367418/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0af1/5fca0d19/76c1d9c6/291c20e6/1240367418/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0af1/5fca0d19/76c1d9c6/291c20e5/1240367418/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0af1/5fca0d19/76c1d9c6/291c20e4/1240367418/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0af1/5fca0d19/76c1d9c6/291c2098/1240367418/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Yang2020
subject: We’re grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Mystery reward (almost) unlocked

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2144%2E377263%2ECtpzcK) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15046?t=5&akid=2144%2E377263%2ECtpzcK) | [Donate Now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15046?t=13&akid=2144%2E377263%2ECtpzcK)

Yang Gang --

Time and again we’ve asked you to step up and hit ambitious fundraising goals. And each time, you've stepped up and had our backs.

You’ve powered this campaign since the beginning and we’re so grateful.

[**Now we need your help again to hit our $1.5 million end-of-October goal. With just six days to go, can you send in a contribution today?**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15046?t=12&akid=2144%2E377263%2ECtpzcK)

Yang2020

name: Team Beto
subject: We needed to address this crisis yesterday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

There’s a grave epidemic going on in our country right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191024-3/?source=ema20191024-63389&t=1001&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]Will you add your name and support Beto in fighting for a
comprehensive, humane response to the opioid epidemic ravaging our
country?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191024-3/?source=ema20191024-63389&t=1002&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]Add your name »

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Every day, more than 130 human beings die after overdosing on opioids.
47,000 human beings a year are losing their lives this way. And a
countless number of family members, friends, neighbors, co-workers, and
communities are suffering from the devastating effects of this epidemic.

We needed to address this crisis yesterday. Victims of this crisis deserve
our support and we must hold every single person responsible for
manufacturing this public health emergency to the highest degree of
accountability.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191024-3/?source=ema20191024-63389&t=1003&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]Please read Beto’s plan to address the opioid epidemic and then add
your name if you agree with him that we need to start supporting
individuals struggling with substance use disorders now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191024-3/?source=ema20191024-63389&t=1004&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]BETO'S 5- PART PLAN

1. End the stigma around substance use disorders, focusing on public
awareness. For far too long, Americans have been shamed and left alone to
suffer with substance use disorders. It’s time to treat these problems
like the public health concerns they are —not as criminal justice problems
as we have been doing.

2. Provide access to health care and interventions that promote long-term
recovery. We must expand access to anyone in need of medication-based
recovery and support at risk populations, including rural Americans,
veterans, Native Americans, and incarcerated individuals. This includes
cracking down on methadone’s for-profit industry and granting additional
grants to states to address this public health crisis.

3. Ensure that individuals with chronic pain are not denied access to the
medications for whom proper usage of opioids are life-sustaining
pharmacotherapy. The CDC must be directed to improve the guidelines
offered to primary care doctors, clinicians, and other specialists who are
issuing opioid prescriptions.

4. Target the supply chain that has allowed this epidemic to flourish.
This means tackling the illegal importation of fentanyl and holding the
medical profession and the pharmaceutical industry accountable. For
instance, in Oklahoma’s recent case against Johnson & Johnson, the judge
ordered that the company must pay the state $572 million, the amount of
money necessary to implement the first year of the state’s abatement plan
to combat the opioid crisis.

5. Support those recovering from substance use disorder, opioid use
disorder, and alcohol use disorder to reach economic stability. We
recognize that these individuals have difficulty finding and holding good
paying jobs. As a result, we must invest in paid training and re-entry
programs for recovering individuals.

We hope you’ll add your name and support this desperately needed plan to
end this health care crisis. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/beto-email-20191024-3/?source=ema20191024-63389&t=1005&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]Add your name »-Team Beto

PS: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39705?t=1006&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R ]If you want to read more details about Beto’s plan, click here and
read our article.

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191024footer&t=1007&refcode2=63389_444211_QEnx4R&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=63389%2E444211%2EQEnx4R

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Warren HQ
subject: Add your name if you agree: All of the Democratic candidates should disavow Super PACs in the primary.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The Democratic primary should be decided by grassroots volunteers and grassroots donors, not the rich and powerful. Add your name if you think every Democratic candidate should say that Super PACs... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528234/45c30650/103d5159e/66f278eb/1236566627/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Here comes the big money.

As some of the other Democratic campaigns have begun to stall, handfuls of wealthy supporters are gearing up to start Super PACs for candidates who can't mobilize enough grassroots support.

That means **Wall Street, billionaires, and giant corporations can dump unlimited sums of money into the Democratic primary to back whatever candidate they think will help them most.**

**[Add your name if you agree: All of the Democratic candidates should disavow Super PACs in the primary.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528234/45c30650/103d5159e/66f278ed/1236566627/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUsxR1BfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMTkxMDI0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-no-super-pacs?source=EMK1GP_RES_NFF_Q_20191024_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

For months now, wealthy bankers and CEOs have been whispering in back rooms, whining on CNBC, and strategizing over expensive dinners about how to get a Democratic nominee who won't change anything for them.

They've seen the strength of our grassroots movement, and they know that if we win, we'll take political and economic power out of their hands and put it where it belongs -- in the hands of the people.

Those powerful special interests are ready to jump at the chance to spend ridiculous amounts of money in the primary -- and against everything we're fighting for.

**The Democratic primary should be decided by grassroots volunteers and grassroots donors, not the rich and powerful.**

**[Add your name if you think every Democratic candidate should say that Super PACs have no place in a Democratic primary.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528234/45c30650/103d5159e/66f278ed/1236566627/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUsxR1BfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMTkxMDI0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-no-super-pacs?source=EMK1GP_RES_NFF_Q_20191024_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528234/45c30650/103d5159e/66f278ed/1236566627/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUsxR1BfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMTkxMDI0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-no-super-pacs?source=EMK1GP_RES_NFF_Q_20191024_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

clean_body: The Democratic primary should be decided by grassroots volunteers and grassroots donors, not the rich and powerful. Add your name if you think every Democratic candidate should say that Super PACs... | | | "" Here comes the big money. As some of the other Democratic campaigns have begun to stall, handfuls of wealthy supporters are gearing up to start Super PACs for candidates who can't mobilize enough grassroots support. That means Wall Street, billionaires, and giant corporations can dump unlimited sums of money into the Democratic primary to back whatever candidate they think will help them most. "" For months now, wealthy bankers and CEOs have been whispering in back rooms, whining on CNBC, and strategizing over expensive dinners about how to get a Democratic nominee who won't change anything for them. They've seen the strength of our grassroots movement, and they know that if we win, we'll take political and economic power out of their hands and put it where it belongs -- in the hands of the people. Those powerful special interests are ready to jump at the chance to spend ridiculous amounts of money in the primary -- and against everything we're fighting for. The Democratic primary should be decided by grassroots volunteers and grassroots donors, not the rich and powerful. "" Thanks, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Family Medical Leave without an Income Tax!
---
Gov Sununu and Sen Bradley Announce Republican-led Family Medical Leave Plan
In case you missed it, on Wednesday, Gov. Chris Sununu and Sen. Jeb Bradley [announced a major piece of GOP-led legislation](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc0NTIzNTI0NjQ3NjIyMTMyJmM9bjVuMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODc1MjMxNjYmZD10NW83czZi.aTPAO4bU6PR4iuNSheJT8BnN15a740G-UgGSHHs5pwM), a voluntary Family Medical Leave that **will** **not impose any new taxes** on the state of New Hampshire! Last year, Senate Democrats', including gubernatorial candidate Dan Feltes, tried to _force an Income Tax_ on New Hampshire through the guise of Family Medical Leave in SB1. Luckily, their efforts were defeated, but there is no doubt that they will push for it again this year! Help us defeat the Feltes Income Tax again and push for a real, innovative, and most importantly Income Tax Free Family Medical Leave Plan. [Please consider donating $10, $25 or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans by clicking here!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc0NTIzNTI0NjQ3NjIyMTMyJmM9bjVuMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODc1MjMxNjgmZD1xN2M1eTlt.BXgsXkNLP8PmZI3rqLsBsRD2Pf98iAT0eHr_yXcnFRM) Thank you Gov. Sununu and Sen Bradley for tackling this important issue and presenting a realistic and Income Tax Free plan!

Peter, **In 2019, the Texas Legislature banned mobile voting locations. Through this one move, Republicans attacked two huge voting populations: students and seniors.** I've visited a senior home in Austin with hundreds of voters, where folks relied on a mobile voting location to vote in numerous recent elections. Now many folks will venture out to voting locations further away, presenting logistical challenges and safety concerns. Whereas rural seniors consistently vote by mail, urban seniors often prefer to vote in person. The ban on mobile voting locations seems precision-guided to target likely Democratic senior voters.

[**The right to vote is our most basic right. I need your help to stand with seniors and fight GOP attacks on our right to vote!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11198865/113748146/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTcwYTc4Yy0zZWY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3_PHaz2J6h8rsAuG-G6lWLBiKf6BZTxdJqTGfSUbGU=&refcode=em102519&recurring=1)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11198866/113748147/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTcwYTc4Yy0zZWY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3_PHaz2J6h8rsAuG-G6lWLBiKf6BZTxdJqTGfSUbGU=&refcode=em102519&recurring=1)
And in terms of the youth vote, numerous high schools and community colleges across the Texas 10th have enough voters to utilize a mobile voting location, but not enough to justify "permanent" voting locations. By taking away the mobile voting option, Republicans will suppress thousands of student votes statewide, unless we can win a court injunction. I am in touch with national voting rights experts to explore emergency legal action. The 26th Amendment of the United States Constitution provides, "The right of citizens of the United States, who are eighteen years of age or older, to vote shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of age." The ban on mobile voting locations singles out students and seniors, taking away a highly effective way to vote. I hope we can build a legal team and plaintiffs who will stop this law before it inflicts any damage on voter participation. **[Join our movement for voting rights right here in Texas 10. I need your help to fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11198867/113748148/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTcwYTc4Yy0zZWY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3_PHaz2J6h8rsAuG-G6lWLBiKf6BZTxdJqTGfSUbGU=&refcode=em102519&recurring=1)**

clean_body: Peter, In 2019, the Texas Legislature banned mobile voting locations. Through this one move, Republicans attacked two huge voting populations: students and seniors. I've visited a senior home in Austin with hundreds of voters, where folks relied on a mobile voting location to vote in numerous recent elections. Now many folks will venture out to voting locations further away, presenting logistical challenges and safety concerns. Whereas rural seniors consistently vote by mail, urban seniors often prefer to vote in person. The ban on mobile voting locations seems precision-guided to target likely Democratic senior voters. And in terms of the youth vote, numerous high schools and community colleges across the Texas 10th have enough voters to utilize a mobile voting location, but not enough to justify "permanent" voting locations. By taking away the mobile voting option, Republicans will suppress thousands of student votes statewide, unless we can win a court injunction. I am in touch with national voting rights experts to explore emergency legal action. The 26th Amendment of the United States Constitution provides, "The right of citizens of the United States, who are eighteen years of age or older, to vote shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of age." The ban on mobile voting locations singles out students and seniors, taking away a highly effective way to vote. I hope we can build a legal team and plaintiffs who will stop this law before it inflicts any damage on voter participation. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Three programs Americans need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
At almost all of the nearly 335 events and gatherings I've enjoyed in Iowa and New Hampshire since I announced my candidacy, I've spoken about the **need to focus on three key issues Americans need addressed, which unfortunately have not yet been** — with a special emphasis on rural communities:
(1) "**Training for a Lifetime",** in which the labor force is guaranteed to be trained and retrained to ensure continued job security as technology changes and globalization moves jobs offshore;
(2) **“Two Tracks” toward ensuring universal healthcare** : one track that tests a public option which can expand to Medicare-for-All, relying on for-profit hospitals and doctors; and a second track that addresses the accelerating closure of for-profit hospitals in rural areas. This second track would transition toward a “VA-like” government-run hospital system in underserved areas since for-profit hospitals are not surviving in the rural areas; and
(3) **A tax credit for those who invest in a small business start-ups** _because we are creating only half as many small businesses as we used to — hurting job creation._ Small businesses not only create 70% of all new jobs, but they are where the majority of Americans work!
**Please read the article below by David Sutor ****in the Tribune-Democrat ****that explains why these programs of mine** — which support all Americans, both the Trump and Clinton voters — **can help**** ****unite our nation** (_the article also covers how I plan to easily fix the student loan burden without simply forgiving all loans_):

**When Joe Sestak campaigns for president throughout Iowa and New Hampshire,** the retired Navy admiral and former U.S. congressman often **points to three areas he would emphasize, if elected, to help rural [and other] communities – medical care access, small business development and job training.**
And Sestak, the only Pennsylvania resident in the crowded Democratic Party field, also feels that approach could benefit small towns in places, such as Cambria, Somerset and Bedford counties.
“This is a win, win, win,” Sestak said during a telephone interview with The Tribune-Democrat on Sunday afternoon. “It’s three legs of a stool. There are other things to do, but those are the three primary ones I talk about in the rurals. And I got to tell you, heads nod.”
P**art of his platform, called “Training for a Lifetime,” involves increasing opportunities for job skills development,** including for older adults looking **for new careers ****after their former professions changed, leading to layoffs.**
“I tell them we invest in public education, sometimes subsidies to go into a community college,” said Sestak. **“These workers, when they lose their job, we don’t take advantage of the investment we already invested in them by having them reacquire a new skill.”**
He added: **“Technology can become obsolete, but never should a worker become obsolete that we’ve already invested in.”**
Sestak wants to expand Revised Pay As You Earn [REPAYE], a U.S. Department of Education program with multiple income-driven options that are designed to make paying back student loans more manageable.
“What we’re going to do is make it mandatory, universal and grandfathered to everyone where you don’t pay more than 10% of your income – disposable income – back, and that’s after you’ve already deducted the 150% the equivalent of the poverty-level income,” Sestak said. “So you’re down to like 7% of your income. And we can lower that to 5% and, for the lower-income people, forgive it after 20 years.** So there’s an easy way to fix the student loan program without making the blue collar worker pay for it, just by forgiving it all.”**
**Expanding training options should go together with encouraging more investment in rural start-ups, according to Sestak.**
“Small businesses need mother’s milk,” he said.
In regards to health care, **Sestak wants to advance the Affordable Care Act with a public option, using the Veterans Health Administration as a pilot template, **with hospitals and doctors being government-provided** or a Medicare-for-all system where the government makes direct payments to private hospitals and doctors.**
“What you want it to be is a transition of choice,” **Sestak said. “Test it out, see if it’s going to work for a number of years.”**
**Sestak said he is running with the goal of “uniting America for all Americans.”**
He did not enter the race until June – when more than 20 candidates had already launched campaigns – because he was spending time with his daughter, Alexandra, who was battling brain cancer.
“They may deem I’m late, the establishment,” he said. “But my ideas are timely. And so that’s what I’m doing. I still think we have a decent chance, done well, done persistently.”
He has raised concerns about how the actions of President Donald Trump have, in his opinion, negatively affected the country.
**“We’ve got to beat Mr. Trump for the character of our nation,” Sestak said.**
**Sestak called Trump’s decision to pull U.S. troops out of northeastern Syria, which led to an invasion by Turkey, “inexcusable.”**
**“The president is abandoning our allies, our commander-in-chief is saying you were there fighting with us against ISIS; now it’s a wrap. I’m coming home and leaving you,” said Sestak, the highest ranking military official ever elected to Congress **where he represented the state’s 7th District.
He criticized Trump’s conversation with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky that led to an impeachment inquiry by the Democratic-led U.S. House of Representatives.
“For the commander-in-chief and president to reach out to a foreign leader – in the case of Ukraine – and ask him to intervene in the most blessed sanctity we have in America, our free elections, is wrong,” said Sestak. “And the evidence – he has said that he did it – that demands that Congress does its duty and does an impeachment inquiry, which they’re doing. But I wish to heck they would do it in a nonpartisan way because the outcome of this has to be at least looked upon by those in both parties as that it was done in a fair and objective way. And I fear that we’ve already lost that higher ground. And that’s a shame.”
Please read my policy papers on 'Training for a Lifetime' ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11201653/113770308/-2052313861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU3ZjA5MS00NGY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0c4oyXiNGN_ghq0Zi-oeBMEfTlZmjNMqBB3dS6kMJNw=&emci=7ef3ab22-33f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1057f091-44f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)), healthcare ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11201654/113770309/-1724538479?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU3ZjA5MS00NGY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0c4oyXiNGN_ghq0Zi-oeBMEfTlZmjNMqBB3dS6kMJNw=&emci=7ef3ab22-33f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1057f091-44f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)) and small businesses ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11201655/113770310/1103943623?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU3ZjA5MS00NGY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0c4oyXiNGN_ghq0Zi-oeBMEfTlZmjNMqBB3dS6kMJNw=&emci=7ef3ab22-33f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1057f091-44f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)). And here’s the link to David Sutor’s article in the Tribune-Democrat ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11201656/113770311/294567303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU3ZjA5MS00NGY3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0c4oyXiNGN_ghq0Zi-oeBMEfTlZmjNMqBB3dS6kMJNw=&emci=b32c0537-2af7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=)).
Warmly,
Joe

Sestak called Trump’s decision to pull U.S. troops out of northeastern Syria, which led to an invasion by Turkey, “inexcusable.” “The president is abandoning our allies, our commander-in-chief is saying you were there fighting with us against ISIS; now it’s a wrap. I’m coming home and leaving you,” said Sestak, the highest ranking military official ever elected to Congress where he represented the state’s 7th District. He criticized Trump’s conversation with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky that led to an impeachment inquiry by the Democratic-led U.S. House of Representatives. “For the commander-in-chief and president to reach out to a foreign leader – in the case of Ukraine – and ask him to intervene in the most blessed sanctity we have in America, our free elections, is wrong,” said Sestak. “And the evidence – he has said that he did it – that demands that Congress does its duty and does an impeachment inquiry, which they’re doing. But I wish to heck they would do it in a nonpartisan way because the outcome of this has to be at least looked upon by those in both parties as that it was done in a fair and objective way. And I fear that we’ve already lost that higher ground. And that’s a shame.” Please read my policy papers on 'Training for a Lifetime' (), healthcare () and small businesses (). And here’s the link to David Sutor’s article in the Tribune-Democrat (=). Warmly, Joe Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. Joe Sestak for President P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Hi Peter

By now, you have heard what the Democrats said BEFORE even taking office in January:

"We're gonna impeach the motherf**ker!" Rashida Tlaib, D-MI

"I am not running for anything except the impeachment of Trump!" Maxine Waters, D-CA

What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats are all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they support impeaching the President for political payback.

We can stop that- but we must act now!

I’m not a career politician. I don't have powerful friends who matter to me more than my neighbors.

I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

We need to oust extremists like Darren Soto, who think it's a good idea to hold secret meetings in the Capitol basement instead of letting their shady dealings be scrutinized!

Impeachment was never supposed to be a method of resolving our political disputes. It's supposed to be a rare way to remove a President who has committed high crimes.

President Trump is innocent! We need to make the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing to our Constitution and to the country.

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need to defeat liberal Democrats like Darren Soto!

If so, then I need your help today!

to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record.

Can I count on you for a donation

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we let the American people know what they have done. It's up to us!

Let's get this done!

name: Paul Begala
subject: Control of the General Assembly is vital
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
We can put Virginia on a safer, smarter course.
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d3/39260142/42757e36/62639455/4039423734/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Working in the White House was the greatest honor of my life. But nowadays it seems as if that sacred building has become enemy-occupied territory. What a welcome contrast Virginia provides. Our Governor has provided thoughtful, inclusive, progressive leadership. And yet Republicans in the General Assembly are adopting Trumpian tactics. They even shut down the special session on gun violence without even considering one of the Governor's common-sense gun safety laws. In a few weeks we can change that. We can elect a General Assembly that will protect our children from gun violence; that will expand educational opportunities; defend civil rights, extend health care, and do something about our God-awful traffic. **[Control of the General Assembly is vital - even more so as we head toward a Census and redistricting. Please join us and consider a donation of $25 or more today!](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d3/39260142/42757e36/62639454/4039423734/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")** We can't fix every problem on the other side of the Potomac in a matter of days, but we can put Virginia on a safer, smarter course. \- Paul Begala

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from The Way Ahead email list, please [click here.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d3/39260142/42757e36/62639457/4039423734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://act.ralphnortham.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead

Richmond VA 23218 |

name: Gary P.
subject: I'm asking for your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
My extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records

---
| |
---
I've got nowhere else to turn, friends: My extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump funneling $3 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why I'm asking for your help - but first, I'd like to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.
If we lose here, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this time around. But polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, and analysts at The Washington Post rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country.

The good news is Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate, but only if we first win in Michigan.

So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. We've set a goal to raise another $4,350 before midnight tonight to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats. I'd appreciate it if you could give now, even just $3, to help us hit this goal and win.
Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: **[_https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa1b/5721a3ed/71202d8c/efaf2ea/3062792515/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMTAtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk110-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you,

Gary

| Friend — After nearly seven years of grateful service as the Representative for Hawaii’s 2nd Congressional District, Tulsi today announced she is committed to her offer to serve Hawaii and our country as President and Commander-in-Chief and will not be seeking re-election to Congress in 2020. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11204903/113793545/-517113545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc1NmNiZi00Y2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSiyJH6ahOtWHNmj2solFee0PJSKZN-dIIfXGb9TPfM=&refcode=em191025-video&refcode2=e6756cbf-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) The reason is simple. Throughout her life, Tulsi has regularly asked herself the same question: How can I best be of service? In her own words “the thought of a ‘political career’ never crossed my mind.” Tulsi has always done her best to serve where she felt she could do the most good. It’s this principle of service above self that has motivated the decisions Tulsi has made throughout her entire life -- and that is what drives our movement. At this moment, when our country is so divided, when we may be sucked into another even more disastrous war in the Middle East, and tensions with other nuclear powers are escalating, and with that, a new arms race and Cold War that can only end in nuclear catastrophe: Tulsi feels she can best serve the people of Hawaii and our country as your President and Commander-in-Chief. **[Tulsi is all in. We need to show her that we’re with her. Show Tulsi you’re all in, chip in $25 right now, and let’s elect our next Commander in Chief.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11204906/113793551/-517113545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc1NmNiZi00Y2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSiyJH6ahOtWHNmj2solFee0PJSKZN-dIIfXGb9TPfM=&refcode=em191025-ask&amount=25&refcode2=e6756cbf-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** [PITCH-IN $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11204913/113793558/-517113545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc1NmNiZi00Y2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSiyJH6ahOtWHNmj2solFee0PJSKZN-dIIfXGb9TPfM=&refcode=em191025_button&amount=25&refcode2=e6756cbf-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) Washington, our country, and the world are in dire need of aloha. Only aloha has the power to heal the divisive wounds in our nation. Only aloha has the power to bring our nation together — recognizing we are all God’s children, and we are all Americans. As President, Tulsi will lead with aloha — putting people ahead of profits, putting people ahead of politics and putting the wellbeing of our people and our planet above all else. Thank you for standing with Tulsi. With aloha always,
TULSI2020 [PITCH-IN $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11204915/113793560/-517113545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc1NmNiZi00Y2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSiyJH6ahOtWHNmj2solFee0PJSKZN-dIIfXGb9TPfM=&refcode=em191025_button&amount=25&refcode2=e6756cbf-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) [View this message in your browser to share](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11204916/113793561/1090060775?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc1NmNiZi00Y2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rSiyJH6ahOtWHNmj2solFee0PJSKZN-dIIfXGb9TPfM=&emci=bdcdbb46-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=e6756cbf-4cf7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&sourceid=1014165&ms=em191025&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191025)

clean_body: | | | | Friend — After nearly seven years of grateful service as the Representative for Hawaii’s 2nd Congressional District, Tulsi today announced she is committed to her offer to serve Hawaii and our country as President and Commander-in-Chief and will not be seeking re-election to Congress in 2020. The reason is simple. Throughout her life, Tulsi has regularly asked herself the same question: How can I best be of service? In her own words “the thought of a ‘political career’ never crossed my mind.” Tulsi has always done her best to serve where she felt she could do the most good. It’s this principle of service above self that has motivated the decisions Tulsi has made throughout her entire life -- and that is what drives our movement. At this moment, when our country is so divided, when we may be sucked into another even more disastrous war in the Middle East, and tensions with other nuclear powers are escalating, and with that, a new arms race and Cold War that can only end in nuclear catastrophe: Tulsi feels she can best serve the people of Hawaii and our country as your President and Commander-in-Chief. Washington, our country, and the world are in dire need of aloha. Only aloha has the power to heal the divisive wounds in our nation. Only aloha has the power to bring our nation together — recognizing we are all God’s children, and we are all Americans. As President, Tulsi will lead with aloha — putting people ahead of profits, putting people ahead of politics and putting the wellbeing of our people and our planet above all else. Thank you for standing with Tulsi. With aloha always, TULSI2020 | | PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707 The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch: Unprecedented opportunity for religious freedom
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7M0GZ3SbWY6bowUn60G2SIWw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=1)
| The Supreme Court’s 2019-2020 session began earlier this month on October 7, 2019, and they will hear a total of 14 cases this month. It’s interesting to note, the Supreme Court receives around 7,000 petitions or more every year and agrees to review roughly 60-70 cases each session. So far this term, the justices have announced 42 cases they plan to review, and they will likely announce another 20 or so cases over the coming months. The nation should be paying close attention to this term as the Supreme Court considers pivotal issues including gun rights, abortion, sexual orientation and gender identity, and funding of religious school choice efforts, to name a few. Experts across the nation have described this session, in particular, as monumental for religious freedom with more than a dozen cases focused on the First Amendment alone. Since Justice Kavanaugh and Justice Gorsuch hold a seat on the bench, it’s believed religious freedom could be restored to new levels in America. | | _"We may be well on our way to more religious freedom than many of us have known in our lifetime. The vision of religious freedom imagined by our Founders and enshrined in our Constitution may soon be restored in America."_ Kelly Shackelford, President of First Liberty
---|---
**Here are three cases this month that are worth noting:**
1. R.G. & G.R. Harris Funeral Homes, Inc. v. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission
2. Bostock v. Clayton City. and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda
3. Kahler v. Kansas

#### R.G. & G.R. Harris Funeral Homes, Inc. v. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission
In 2013, a 58-year-old biological male funeral director informed his workplace, a Christian funeral home, of his plans to transition from a man to a woman. He would begin by dressing like a woman and changing his name to be called Aimee Stephens. The Christian company had concerns over which bathroom Stephens would use and that he would no longer comply with the company dress code. Overall they were concerned that his transition could be disruptive to grieving clients who came to the Christian funeral home. Because of these reasons, the company fired Stephens and offered him a severance package, which he refused. Stephens then filed a complaint with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC). The EEOC filed a suit against Harris Funeral Homes claiming they violated Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 by firing Stephens because of his sexual orientation. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MzS_Y0IVk1ydibORMEaTd8w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=2).
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=3)
#### Bostock v. Clayton City and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda
These two cases, Bostock v. Clayton City and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda were argued in tangent with one another before the Supreme Court earlier this month. Both cases challenge the Civil Rights Act of 1964 because the act does not include gender identity or sexual orientation.
In Bostock v. Clayton City, a gay man named Geral Bostock claimed that during his employment with Clayton County, Georgia, he was discriminated against because of his sexual orientation. And in GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda, Donald Zarda, a gay skydiving instructor, claimed he was wrongfully terminated because of his sexual orientation. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MqiCWqb3pzhmMXig31N_jwg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=4).
**The central question in all of these cases:** Does Title VII prohibit discrimination on the basis of gender identity? Oral arguments for these cases were heard on October 8, 2019.
#### Kahler v. Kansas
In the case of Kahler v. Kansas, the Supreme Court will decide whether the Constitution prohibits states from abolishing the insanity defense. James Kahler was charged with first-degree murder after shooting and killing his estranged wife, two daughters, and grandmother on the Saturday after Thanksgiving in 2009. His defense counsel argued because of job loss and severe depression, he was unable to form the intent and premeditation necessary to be charged with premeditated capital murder. The state’s forensic psychiatrist arrived at a different conclusion. The psychiatrist argued he did have the capacity to form intent and premeditation, supported by the fact that he planned the shooting and choose not to kill his son, who was also present. Kahler was convicted and sentenced to death, and the ruling was affirmed by the Kansas Supreme Court. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MCUsQKU9wYTjayXokCqbnxg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=5).
**Christians need to keep a close watch on the Supreme Court as it hears cases involving the sanctity of life, gun rights, religious freedom, gender orientation, school choice, and so much more.**
**We must be faithful to pray for the nine Supreme Court Justices to have God’s wisdom as they decide on rulings and set the judicial precedent for our nation, impacting generations to come.**
_“Those who forsake the law praise the wicked, but those who keep the law strive against them. Evil men do not understand justice, but those who seek the LORD understand it completely. - Proverbs 28:4-5_
**United. We Stand.**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191025com01&n=6)

clean_body: | | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court | The Supreme Court’s 2019-2020 session began earlier this month on October 7, 2019, and they will hear a total of 14 cases this month. It’s interesting to note, the Supreme Court receives around 7,000 petitions or more every year and agrees to review roughly 60-70 cases each session. So far this term, the justices have announced 42 cases they plan to review, and they will likely announce another 20 or so cases over the coming months. The nation should be paying close attention to this term as the Supreme Court considers pivotal issues including gun rights, abortion, sexual orientation and gender identity, and funding of religious school choice efforts, to name a few. Experts across the nation have described this session, in particular, as monumental for religious freedom with more than a dozen cases focused on the First Amendment alone. Since Justice Kavanaugh and Justice Gorsuch hold a seat on the bench, it’s believed religious freedom could be restored to new levels in America. | | "We may be well on our way to more religious freedom than many of us have known in our lifetime. The vision of religious freedom imagined by our Founders and enshrined in our Constitution may soon be restored in America." Kelly Shackelford, President of First Liberty ---|--- Here are three cases this month that are worth noting: 1. R.G. & G.R. Harris Funeral Homes, Inc. v. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission 2. Bostock v. Clayton City. and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda 3. Kahler v. Kansas R.G. & G.R. Harris Funeral Homes, Inc. v. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission In 2013, a 58-year-old biological male funeral director informed his workplace, a Christian funeral home, of his plans to transition from a man to a woman. He would begin by dressing like a woman and changing his name to be called Aimee Stephens. The Christian company had concerns over which bathroom Stephens would use and that he would no longer comply with the company dress code. Overall they were concerned that his transition could be disruptive to grieving clients who came to the Christian funeral home. Because of these reasons, the company fired Stephens and offered him a severance package, which he refused. Stephens then filed a complaint with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC). The EEOC filed a suit against Harris Funeral Homes claiming they violated Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 by firing Stephens because of his sexual orientation. Read the full analysis . Bostock v. Clayton City and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda These two cases, Bostock v. Clayton City and GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda were argued in tangent with one another before the Supreme Court earlier this month. Both cases challenge the Civil Rights Act of 1964 because the act does not include gender identity or sexual orientation. In Bostock v. Clayton City, a gay man named Geral Bostock claimed that during his employment with Clayton County, Georgia, he was discriminated against because of his sexual orientation. And in GA Altitude Express, Inc. v. Zarda, Donald Zarda, a gay skydiving instructor, claimed he was wrongfully terminated because of his sexual orientation. Read the full analysis . The central question in all of these cases: Does Title VII prohibit discrimination on the basis of gender identity? Oral arguments for these cases were heard on October 8, 2019. Kahler v. Kansas In the case of Kahler v. Kansas, the Supreme Court will decide whether the Constitution prohibits states from abolishing the insanity defense. James Kahler was charged with first-degree murder after shooting and killing his estranged wife, two daughters, and grandmother on the Saturday after Thanksgiving in 2009. His defense counsel argued because of job loss and severe depression, he was unable to form the intent and premeditation necessary to be charged with premeditated capital murder. The state’s forensic psychiatrist arrived at a different conclusion. The psychiatrist argued he did have the capacity to form intent and premeditation, supported by the fact that he planned the shooting and choose not to kill his son, who was also present. Kahler was convicted and sentenced to death, and the ruling was affirmed by the Kansas Supreme Court. Read the full analysis . Christians need to keep a close watch on the Supreme Court as it hears cases involving the sanctity of life, gun rights, religious freedom, gender orientation, school choice, and so much more. We must be faithful to pray for the nine Supreme Court Justices to have God’s wisdom as they decide on rulings and set the judicial precedent for our nation, impacting generations to come. “Those who forsake the law praise the wicked, but those who keep the law strive against them. Evil men do not understand justice, but those who seek the LORD understand it completely. - Proverbs 28:4-5 United. We Stand. * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Peter, Susan Collins has served in the Senate for 22 years, billing herself as a moderate, pro-choice, pro-women's rights conservative who is the voice of bipartisanship. But her votes show that she is anything but that. She cast the deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. She betrayed survivors and her constituents' trust by siding with party politics and pressure from Mitch McConnell and cutting short an FBI investigation into Kavanaugh. Now she has a job approval rating of just 35 percent in Maine, and _Cook Political Report_ has classified her seat as a "toss-up". Democrats have NO CHANCE of taking back the Senate unless we win in Maine, and Susan Collins has never been this vulnerable to losing! But Mitch McConnell knows his Senate majority depends on Maine, so he and the GOP will inundate the state with their usual dirty tricks, voter suppression, and an avalanche of dark money to hang on to power. Sara Gideon, the Democratic challenger, announced that she raised a whopping $3.2 million in Q3, with nearly 97 percent of those donations being less than $100 \-- donations from people like you who helped show Susan Collins that we won't stand for her any longer. [**Every dollar given goes toward helping Sara have another great grassroots showing and fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins. Can you pitch in by donating even just $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd81/6e9863e8/15d3df7b/1db08e73/1777901572/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191025a.ND&refcode2=fzt9pD22qn3ODfDpFmB6") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd81/6e9863e8/15d3df7b/1db08e73/1777901572/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191025a.ND&refcode2=fzt9pD22qn3ODfDpFmB6")

clean_body: I want YOUR name to be on the wall. | | | | | | | | | Friend, There isn't much time left. We're running full steam ahead into 2020, and that means we're almost done finalizing the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall. There is no better way to show the Liberal Democrats that you reject their corrupt SOCIALIST agenda than by cementing your name in history with Team Trump. It'll have them fuming. But, we just gave my father the latest list of American Patriots who contributed to get their names engraved on the Donor Wall and he noticed your name was STILL MISSING. | You've always been one of my father's best supporters and strongest defenders against the Left and FAKE NEWS media, and he REALLY wants to make sure YOUR NAME is up there. Your Suggested Contribution for the Donor Wall: $35 The names on the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall will represent the Patriots who have stood by my father from the beginning. These men and women are proud deplorables, who believe in the constitutional rights our country was founded on, unlike the 2020 Democrat Try-Hards, and my father is proud to display their names. We're sending the list of names to be engraved at 11:59 PM TONIGHT , and we want to make sure you're able to take advantage of this EXCLUSIVE opportunity. Will we see your name? Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Theresa Greenfield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | OFF THE SIDELINES ENDORSES THERESA GREENFIELD (D-IA) FOR SENATE.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO THERESA 'S CAMPAIGN AND FLIP THE SENATE!**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| I first met Theresa Greenfield on the campaign trail in Iowa this summer. She had just announced her run for Senate, and I was immediately taken by her authenticity, resilience, and commitment to Iowa families.

**She 's the real deal.** A self-described "farm kid" from Iowa, Theresa lost her first husband in a workplace accident when she was just 24 and pregnant with their second son. She says social security and worker's compensation helped restart her life and build a career as an urban planner.

She'll be a powerful voice for Iowans and fight tirelessly to protect our environment, expand economic opportunity, and combat greed and corruption in Washington. **I 'm proud to lend her my strongest endorsement.**

We need to net just four seats to take back the Senate--and with Theresa in the race, I know Iowa can be one of them. But electing Theresa is going to take each of us doing everything we can.

[**Will you do your part and support Theresa 's campaign today? Rush a contribution and help turn the Senate blue.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Here's why I know we can win this seat:****
* **Trump is growing increasingly unpopular in Iowa** --his trade war with China is hurting Iowa farmers and weighing down the state's economy.

* A new poll has Theresa **within single digits of her opponent.**

****
* Democrats picked up two competitive House seats in Iowa in 2018: The Hawkeye State is trending blue.

Theresa is the right candidate at the right time--but it's up to us to ensure she has the resources she needs to win.

---
| Split a donation between Theresa's re-election campaign and Off the Sidelines today:
---
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $25](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate $50](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | [Donate $100](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Other](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIzMTk2ODAS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTU1NTU4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Thank you,

Kirsten
---

Peter, Did you see the message Corky sent the other day? He is hosting his very first Town Hall next Tuesday! Corky is going to be at the Derry Opera House from 6:30 PM - 8:00 PM. Tickets are free, but they are going quickly! [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/46f9b6088eee2900/580ca5cadc9a76fcc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Joe,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to receive an invitation to this exciting development. **Next Tuesday, I will be holding my first town hall to hear from the voters of New Hampshire!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/46f9b6088eee2900/3a6e2eb808b41c0cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
**What:** Town Hall with Corky Messner
**When:** Tuesday, October 29th 6:30 PM – 8:00 PM
**Where:** Derry Opera House
29 W Broadway
Derry, NH 03038

[**RSVP Now!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/46f9b6088eee2900/a3ef52a9d87da951c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
I’m sure that it’s going to be a great night, Joe. I can’t wait to hear from Granite Staters about what impacts you the most. Whether it’s foreign policy, healthcare, or taxes, I know my positions will be in stark contrast with Jeanne Shaheen.

Please, don’t forget to RSVP – **[just click or tap here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/46f9b6088eee2900/397c3fa5081a3299c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

All the best,

Corky

name: Team Hick
subject: Four seats to the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Here's something to think about as we inch closer to our October fundraising deadline: Democrats need to pick up just four seats to take back the majority in the U.S. Senate. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788cd/1478881908/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| | **Mitch McConnell is pulling out all the stops to hang on to this seat. Let 's show him that Colorado can't be bought by special interests.**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Team,

Here's something to think about as we inch closer to our October fundraising deadline: **Democrats need to pick up just four seats to take back the majority in the U.S. Senate.**

And the odds that we can pull it off have gone up significantly in the last few weeks. That's great news for us, but it's terrible news for Mitch McConnell--and what he's doing behind the scenes shows he knows it.

McConnell and his allies in Washington have made it crystal clear that they view Colorado as one of their biggest vulnerabilities in 2020, and they're prepared to do whatever it takes to protect Cory Gardner. We recently found out McConnell is personally lining up outside groups to stockpile dark money to spend in the Senate battleground states.

We don't have a network of special interests shoveling cash into our campaign account--that's just not how our democracy should work. We've rejected donations from corporate PACs. This campaign is powered by you. Our average grassroots donation is just $26.

**Chip in whatever you can before our October fundraising deadline, and let 's show Mitch McConnell that this seat can't be bought:**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._
[**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
Thank you,
Team Hick
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191025_TH_20191025-fr-TH-EOM2-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788c2/1478881908/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788c3/1478881908/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788c0/1478881908/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788c1/1478881908/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788fe/1478881908/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788ff/1478881908/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377149a/691c9bd/6fd2e553/11a788c2/1478881908/VEsHAw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

subject: What Dan and the team are up to! →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11211476/113851080/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDhhNDRiOC02N2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFZatZ7HUyg5XrWjUMNGs9v1GdDyTNTC4NGJ_pMisJ4=&emci=e89d9a22-36f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=408a44b8-67f7-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| | | | Hi Peter,

As Dan stays busy fighting for IL-03 in Congress and our campaign operations heat up in the district, we wanted to catch you up on what Team Lipinksi has been up to for the past few weeks. Take a look!

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
Last weekend, Dan had a great time pouring beers at the 9th Annual Brew Moon Festival at The MAX in McCook raising money for Aging Care Connections and the Warehouse Project! Brew Moon is the largest craft beer event in the western suburbs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11211477/113851081/1221932699?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDhhNDRiOC02N2Y3LWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFZatZ7HUyg5XrWjUMNGs9v1GdDyTNTC4NGJ_pMisJ4=&refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191025_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)
* * *

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/f22f9703145b22a3c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, Our campaign has a ton of momentum! Two weeks ago our campaign received President Trump's enthusiastic endorsement, and last week we posted a very strong fundraising number. Now, we need to keep it going if we are going to KEEP UP WITH THE MILLIONS ultra-liberal, do-nothing Senator Tina Smith is raising. **[It’s “$5 Friday” and we need EVERY supporter to step up to help!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/54ba6bb781bbdac8c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** Building on our momentum following President Trump’s enthusiastic endorsement is crucial. We can’t let up for a moment as we take on Tina Smith and the rest of Minnesota’s unhinged and out-of-control radical-left. Our efforts are powered by grassroots support, Fellow Conservative. **In fact, 89.6% of our 3rd quarter donations came from Minnesota – representing 65 counties – and 86% were $200 or less!** Tina Smith is relying on PAC and DC insider money in this race. **[Jason is counting on ALL of us... and every $5 will help us reach 9 more voters!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/7f0638d265876f6cc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** [ Chip in $5 HERE! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/aacbd805afc640b6c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Help Jason fight alongside President Trump to win Minnesota in 2020. We need bold, unwavering conservative leadership in the U.S. Senate, to fight for our priorities. We’re going to surprise Jason tomorrow morning with a list of all those who’ve stepped up to help this week. **[Chip in $5 or more today, and we’ll add your name!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/6938311bc99ada94c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** \- Team Lewis [ Chip in $5 HERE! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/51354a92adf53233/9326cb003bff19d2c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Take our October survey and tell us about the issues you care about. We'll review the results and use your feedback to help us run a more informed, people-powered campaign.
body:
Survey link inside.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb9/4bef7a87/6b24ab2d/287fdbc9/1859752109/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Back in June, our team reached out asking you to take our issue survey. (Thank you to all who participated!)
At the time, we found that our supporters' #1 issue across the board was health care. And 94% of you were concerned about the influence of money in politics.
We're asking you to take our issue survey _again_ so we can track how opinions and attitudes changed over time.
[**Will you help us by taking our October issue survey now? Share which issues you care the most about and which affect your life most directly.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb9/4bef7a87/6b24ab2d/287fdbc8/1859752109/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Sara-gideon-issue-survey-oct?source=em191025-full")
We'll plan to send this survey around again in a few months, just to check back in. It will help us stay more connected to our supporters and run a more informed campaign.
So thanks for sharing what this campaign means to you, and for being a part of our team.
All our best,
\- Team Sara
****[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb9/4bef7a87/6b24ab2d/287fdbc8/1859752109/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Sara-gideon-issue-survey-oct?source=em191025-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb9/4bef7a87/6b24ab2d/287fdbcf/1859752109/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cb9/4bef7a87/6b24ab2d/287fdbce/1859752109/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: The DNC debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, **Moments ago, the DNC raised the debate stage threshold to 200,000 unique donors.** That means in order for me to be on the debate stage in December, we're going to need all hands on deck. **[I know we can do this, but only with your help. Please chip in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191025_CB_20191025-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here's the deal, team: **Right now we have 178,378 individual donors -- that means we 're less than 22,000 away.** This is a crowded Democratic primary, and debates offer some of the only opportunities for an underdog campaign like ours to break through -- to get a chance to compete on a level playing field with those other campaigns that are raising tens of millions of dollars. It's more important than ever before to join our team and make sure our collective voices are heard on the national stage. **Can you chip in $1 for the first time and be one of the 21,622 additional unique donors we need to qualify?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191025_CB_20191025-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_express1&amount=1&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's no secret that our campaign is an underdog in the race. I'm used to being counted out -- we've seen it before when I ran for mayor of Newark. And we were doubted when we took on big challenges in the Senate. But we've always come together to win. **[Can you chip in today to help me qualify for the December debates?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191025_CB_20191025-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
We can do this. Thank you for your support.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191025_CB_20191025-fr-CB-decdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0afd/5fca0d19/76cffd68/291c3dfd/909986206/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Conservative News
subject: Trump accuses Obama of treason for ‘spying’ on his 2016 campaign
body:
**Conservative News Alert**
**From Fox News:**
# Trump accuses Obama of treason for 'spying' on his 2016 campaign
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqUOM0zJ3Hjg1jeaEDbdI5CPbsLoNQ6CNMgXVe94kcjdC1wFDJL9flHJ12VhkaBI77hGuxEeBYWtjMX1gBzQhN4FV27YPDnjtuKz9dLhBkJzzOOMjT9RqcvhZCdsY2bMUbxICsejzyCKKkXbRwSQ5Eyi8zi-sycH-6p7Cpxj2BoXTj7jHzEY1AjNcmjMfqXTJkXOlmyFY9f5ckb7NxnztoVlwVD1ZlL6BwV___iK-3IkZP0Hn7HrIQ==&c=Ey9sY6q-SK0U2cxwknbg72EiDaXiMkcLNnJX_pyeaaMN_-8bMl2z9Q==&ch=pF5XGSVInBMTkg-zq9cRoMVrwasWx72xQMH3ct1Ta2xgh1EhsPQIag==)
President Trump has ratcheted up his claim that the Obama White House spied on his 2016 campaign, charging in a new book that it was a "treasonous" act by the former Democratic president.
"What they did was treasonous, OK? It was treasonous," he told author Doug Wead for his upcoming book, "[Inside Trump's White House: The Real Story of His Presidency."](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqUOM0zJ3Hjg1jeaEDbdI5CPbsLoNQ6CNMgXVe94kcjdC1wFDJL9flHJ12VhkaBIA-bhKD3JyPAG5ngU4AusQW8QlVUY7_GpjGCKNEyxfZL6S9HWSBCLsU7AVuHKEnEht5_AolQZxgbIS30TJpQe9AxDh-iO65Z3pYKoxKJEvtlrkRw-SvCXFCfsp3GBIZthKwB-OB3xR25hZ7lAl_H3xcE0ti4SixSxoPO8j0ML9L8x_TGmDbmutqjB91VXBQWsifgeEMqTZ5DXiGuQVFxZ9kfFq4EjRk9fQGdNFQrtDNdc0nFiODzxAIVtorC6wTF-QrXSxVjX7y6-Pkbj8XBms0imcwrj0h8b4p40qAi0O1naBOmY0NyRUn3QOS4gyMCIZinI3vDXRLSIFSi9x_Ud0A0nHupGeLEg&c=Ey9sY6q-SK0U2cxwknbg72EiDaXiMkcLNnJX_pyeaaMN_-8bMl2z9Q==&ch=pF5XGSVInBMTkg-zq9cRoMVrwasWx72xQMH3ct1Ta2xgh1EhsPQIag==)
[Click here to read more](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqUOM0zJ3Hjg1jeaEDbdI5CPbsLoNQ6CNMgXVe94kcjdC1wFDJL9flHJ12VhkaBI77hGuxEeBYWtjMX1gBzQhN4FV27YPDnjtuKz9dLhBkJzzOOMjT9RqcvhZCdsY2bMUbxICsejzyCKKkXbRwSQ5Eyi8zi-sycH-6p7Cpxj2BoXTj7jHzEY1AjNcmjMfqXTJkXOlmyFY9f5ckb7NxnztoVlwVD1ZlL6BwV___iK-3IkZP0Hn7HrIQ==&c=Ey9sY6q-SK0U2cxwknbg72EiDaXiMkcLNnJX_pyeaaMN_-8bMl2z9Q==&ch=pF5XGSVInBMTkg-zq9cRoMVrwasWx72xQMH3ct1Ta2xgh1EhsPQIag==)
# From The Daily Caller:
# Schumer Announces Plan To Nix Virtually Every Gas Powered Vehicle In The Country
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqUOM0zJ3Hjg1jeaEDbdI5CPbsLoNQ6CNMgXVe94kcjdC1wFDJL9flHJ12VhkaBIZsGO9qrQJzm7LlyxYtWnw9PBlpuQV74fQbIL36ARn__vylMHu6MHAQMO7Wfr-bMqFpQIqakU1vlBfkTPxCkA4H3d6eU6i9xsRknLg1UjmVqD6J2U0mvvBEvM7BPbG27Db1EGqDTYI4w=&c=Ey9sY6q-SK0U2cxwknbg72EiDaXiMkcLNnJX_pyeaaMN_-8bMl2z9Q==&ch=pF5XGSVInBMTkg-zq9cRoMVrwasWx72xQMH3ct1Ta2xgh1EhsPQIag==)
Democratic Sen. Chuck Schumer is preparing to spend hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars on a plan that would fast-track the elimination of nearly every gas-powered vehicle in the country.
[Click here to read more](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rqUOM0zJ3Hjg1jeaEDbdI5CPbsLoNQ6CNMgXVe94kcjdC1wFDJL9flHJ12VhkaBIZsGO9qrQJzm7LlyxYtWnw9PBlpuQV74fQbIL36ARn__vylMHu6MHAQMO7Wfr-bMqFpQIqakU1vlBfkTPxCkA4H3d6eU6i9xsRknLg1UjmVqD6J2U0mvvBEvM7BPbG27Db1EGqDTYI4w=&c=Ey9sY6q-SK0U2cxwknbg72EiDaXiMkcLNnJX_pyeaaMN_-8bMl2z9Q==&ch=pF5XGSVInBMTkg-zq9cRoMVrwasWx72xQMH3ct1Ta2xgh1EhsPQIag==)
