name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: RE: Joe Biden, Tom Steyer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I won't mince words with you: My campaign is fighting to stay funded. Meanwhile -- here's what I'm up against: \- Tom Steyer just personally spent $47 MILLION to buy a spot in the next debates. **\- And Joe Biden just went back on his word to reject all super PAC money. ** [_**I refuse to go back on my word to you to build this campaign without a cent from corporate PACs -- even now that I am in dire need of funds to stay in this race and compete against billionaire candidates. It would mean so much to me to have your $5 to hit my make-or-break goal instead. I 'm truly counting on your $5 before I'm forced out of this race. >> **_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191025_em_fr_b2_castro_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I mean it when I say this: **If I can 't meet my $800,000 goal before the end of this month -- I will be forced out of this race. ** We've come too far and shattered too many expectations to let it end like this. So many people are counting on us to keep speaking truth to power. name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Donald Trump can't stand this bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This week Senate Republicans blocked Mark's bipartisan election security legislation, the FIRE Act, which would require presidential campaigns to report attempts at election interference to the FBI.
|
---
| | | **"Senate GOP blocks three election security bills"**
-- _The Hill_
---

This week Senate Republicans blocked Mark's bipartisan election security legislation, the FIRE Act, which would require presidential campaigns to report attempts at election interference to the FBI.

Why? Because Donald Trump has made it clear he can't stand this bill.

Mark's not going to back down when it comes to securing our elections. But if we really want to stop Donald Trump from personally blocking Mark's crucial legislation, we need to flip the Senate and take back the White House.

**To do this, we need to work together to keep Virginia blue. Will you chip in now to help Mark win and send Donald Trump packing in 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902fa/3714627244/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?express_lane=true&refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902f9/3714627244/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?express_lane=true&refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902f8/3714627244/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?express_lane=true&refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e7/3714627244/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?express_lane=true&refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e6/3714627244/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?express_lane=true&refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e5/3714627244/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
We know the President is personally fighting to stop Mark's election security legislation because he cheered on GOP Senators for blocking it. Meanwhile, the White House singled out the legislation for a veto if it makes it to the President's desk.

With all the news that's come out about the President's attempts to solicit dirt on his political opponent, Joe Biden, Mark believes it is more important than ever that we require presidential candidates to report attempted foreign interference.

Unfortunately, nearly three years after Russia attacked our democracy, the Senate has refused to act on bipartisan election security legislation that would secure our elections ahead of 2020. If we're going to change that, we need a Democratic Senate and a President who will put the security of our democracy ahead of personal political interests.

That path to victory runs right through the Commonwealth of Virginia. **[So please, chip in today and help Mark keep up the fight for election security.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e4/3714627244/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e3/3714627244/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-electionsecurity?refcode=20191025nd__295__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d03c/53d9897e/52125480/1c8902e2/3714627244/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Have you met Marc yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
** Hi Peter!
------------------------------------------------------------
Have you met Marc yet? Now is your chance! This Sunday, October 27th, Marc will be speaking at a meet and greet at Bacco (https://www.baccowinebars.com/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1ea13de6f7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_25_04_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1ea13de6f7-32267927) in Houston, hosted by some of our amazing supporters. We'd like to invite you to come out and hear why Marc is running for Congress, and how you can get involved. If you'd like to attend, please click here (https://www.evite.com/event/0130N7O7XTHL5AS6IEPJ53YC56OJVY/rsvp?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=sharable_invite&utm_campaign=send_sharable_link&fbclid=IwAR2s9thz5TUUG4zmRfOEl-vpCLZ8MyxuNYWvwHiijfjRPXXK_Ou0fynPBhg&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1ea13de6f7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_25_04_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1ea13de6f7-32267927) !
RSVP here! (https://www.evite.com/event/0130N7O7XTHL5AS6IEPJ53YC56OJVY/rsvp?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=sharable_invite&utm_campaign=send_sharable_link&fbclid=IwAR2s9thz5TUUG4zmRfOEl-vpCLZ8MyxuNYWvwHiijfjRPXXK_Ou0fynPBhg&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1ea13de6f7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_25_04_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1ea13de6f7-32267927)

Bring questions, bring a friend!

We want to meet you and hear from you!

If you'd like to host your own meet and greet, feel free to respond to this email, and we will set something up with you!
Lastly, we will be block walking in Scenic Woods tomorrow, to spread the word and meet voters. We'd like to see you there! You can sign up to walk with us here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/146081/?fbclid=IwAR0CZt8Eig7Nr6sc-xUte2c290IueliL-l2YuytoKE09-BnLoE-l_Xrr884&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1ea13de6f7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_25_04_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1ea13de6f7-32267927) , and we'll send you all the information you need.
Walk with Marc! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/146081/?fbclid=IwAR0CZt8Eig7Nr6sc-xUte2c290IueliL-l2YuytoKE09-BnLoE-l_Xrr884&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1ea13de6f7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_25_04_14&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1ea13de6f7-32267927)
See you this weekend!

Lowell Davis

============================================================

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: More Attacks
disclaimer_text: paid for by outside groups
body:
Peter,

I need to ask for your help. At home, in the district, I remain under attack by conservative groups from outside Central Virginia who continue to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking my legislative record on TV and online, and we're putting together our response plan. [**Can I ask you to make a contribution today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bwa9GTi0wow1-AHs2HItdJoaLRFc8JzwIajEDINKj_4=/2xv-AqtxOxuChIAVpnTqUnW3LxPmRQM0T3bVBddNtaM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191025-1-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800) | | | [ DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/bwa9GTi0wow1-AHs2HItdJoaLRFc8JzwIajEDINKj_4=/2xv-AqtxOxuChIAVpnTqUnW3LxPmRQM0T3bVBddNtaM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191025-1-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
---
These outside groups want to distract from the work I'm doing for Central Virginians, and they're meant to create a hyper-partisan atmosphere with the hopes of scaring people.

I'm under attack with ads like these running throughout my district, paid for by outside groups.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bwa9GTi0wow1-AHs2HItdJoaLRFc8JzwIajEDINKj_4=/2xv-AqtxOxuChIAVpnTqUnW3LxPmRQM0T3bVBddNtaM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191025-1-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
[**But these attacks won 't work. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/bwa9GTi0wow1-AHs2HItdJoaLRFc8JzwIajEDINKj_4=/2xv-AqtxOxuChIAVpnTqUnW3LxPmRQM0T3bVBddNtaM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191025-1-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)

We're building a grassroots campaign. We're listening to the needs of Central Virginia families. And we're focused on the priorities of this district: lowering healthcare costs, expanding broadband coverage, and helping people afford their medications.

We're more than a year from my election, but national Republicans have shown that they're willing to throw hundreds of thousands of dollars at our race. [**Can you make a contribution to my campaign today to help us fight back?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bwa9GTi0wow1-AHs2HItdJoaLRFc8JzwIajEDINKj_4=/2xv-AqtxOxuChIAVpnTqUnW3LxPmRQM0T3bVBddNtaM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191025-1-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)

---
Thank you,

_-Abigail_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: 11 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Election Day is in 11 days. And what happens over the next 11 days will determine the results we see after the polls close on November 5 in cities...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/11-days?e=1acd9bb3d6)
11 Days

Election Day is in 11 days. And what happens over the next 11 days will determine the results we see after the polls close on November 5 in cities across Indiana.

Together, our work knocking on doors, making voter calls and talking with our neighbors over the next 11 days will determine if we elect more results-focused Republican leaders to serve our communities, or if we risk more Democrat-led debt and dysfunction.

This week, I’ve been in Grant, Huntington and Elkhart counties (https://www.elkharttruth.com/news/gop-state-chair-stumps-for-mayoral-candidate/article_7e822792-9e77-5599-8d99-684ae09a88ed.html?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) supporting our local candidates for office, and while there, I saw firsthand the big impact Republicans like you can have in these final days.

How can you help? Here’s three quick ways:
1. Join for our final Super Saturday (http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , this week in Fort Wayne supporting mayoral candidate Tim Smith
2. Sign-up for a shift (or two, or three...) at the statewide phone bank at our Indiana GOP headquarters (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf29L6eFx1hVs_mC5M6ufMo6bK-_3f6zX36TldtGsV3xj0-Pg/viewform?mc_cid=d9819126cb&mc_eid=8e9e20dc8f&mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) in downtown Indy the weekend before the election
3. Reach out to your local party leaders (http://indiana.gop/counties?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and get plugged into the big Republican race in your community.

In 11 days, Republicans will show that hard work leads to winning. And that winning leads to great local government service for Hoosiers.

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

Photo:
Elkhart is ready to win! (https://www.elkharttruth.com/news/gop-state-chair-stumps-for-mayoral-candidate/article_7e822792-9e77-5599-8d99-684ae09a88ed.html?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Chairman Hupfer joined (left to right) Elkhart County GOP Chairman Dan Holtz, State Senator Linda Rogers, Elkhart Mayor Tim Neese, Elkhart mayoral candidate Dave Miller and State Rep. Tim Wesco for a photo at a packed event supporting Miller in Elkhart.

Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Putting People First: In Terre Haute!

It's been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! He was in Terre Haute at two events that were all about Putting People First! Governor Holcomb stopped at Indiana State University to attend a luncheon benefiting ISU's partnership with Habitat for Humanity. Governor Holcomb also attended the Hamilton Awards Dinner in Terre Haute.
* Governor Holcomb attended a luncheon celebrating ISU's Habitat for Humanity partnership, as the university works to help increase home ownership in Terre Haute's Ryves neighborhood. At the event, ISU President Dr. Deborah Curtis announced that the university met its fundraising goal of $60,000. Governor Holcomb then joined President Curtis in a fireside chat at the luncheon, where they discussed topics ranging from housing to school safety.
* Governor Holcomb also attended the annual Hamilton Awards Dinner, hosted by the Hamilton Center. At the awards dinner, Governor Holcomb spoke about his work to attack Indiana's drug epidemic. The Hamilton Center works to help meet individuals' behavioral health and substance abuse needs.

Governor Holcomb is working hard to continue Putting People First in all corners of our state!
Easy Way to Make a Big Difference:
Statewide Republican Phone Bank:

Want to help our Indiana Republican mayoral candidates, but don't know how? Join your Indiana Republican Party (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf29L6eFx1hVs_mC5M6ufMo6bK-_3f6zX36TldtGsV3xj0-Pg/viewform?mc_cid=d9819126cb&mc_eid=8e9e20dc8f&mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) in the final days leading up to Election Day to help make phone calls to voters, encouraging them to get out and vote for our Republican mayoral candidates across the state!

We’ve got multiple days of fun phone banks – and lots of opportunities to help:

Indiana GOP Phone Banks
Indiana GOP HQ – Downtown Indianapolis

Thursday, Oct. 31: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m.
Friday, Nov. 1: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m.
Saturday, Nov. 2: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Sunday, Nov. 3: 12 p.m. – 8 p.m.
Monday, Nov. 4: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Tuesday, Nov. 5: 9 p.m. – 5:45 p.m.

It’s an easy way to make a big difference to help our candidates win their races and deliver results for Hoosiers. RSVP here now! (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf29L6eFx1hVs_mC5M6ufMo6bK-_3f6zX36TldtGsV3xj0-Pg/viewform?mc_cid=d9819126cb&mc_eid=8e9e20dc8f&mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Winning = Working Hard!

Your team at the Indiana Republican Party has partnered with mayoral campaigns across the state over the last month for Super Saturdays, helping make a difference in some of Indiana’s key races. We’ve knocked on thousands of doors to let Hoosiers know more about our candidates, but we’re not done yet!

Join us this Saturday in Fort Wayne as we go door-to-door in support of mayoral candidate Tim Smith. RSVP here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-fort-wayne-tickets-73590676695?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and we’ll be in touch with all of the details!

And then join us in the final drive before Election Day for our Indiana GOP HQ phone bank (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf29L6eFx1hVs_mC5M6ufMo6bK-_3f6zX36TldtGsV3xj0-Pg/viewform?usp=sf_link&mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , as we make calls in support of our mayoral candidates across the state.
Vote Now!
Early voting has now begun for municipal elections throughout Indiana! Have you voted yet?

Visit the Indiana Secretary of State’s Official Voter Portal – IndianaVoters.com (https://indianavoters.in.gov/?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) – now to get your latest voting info, including a full list of candidates on your ballot, your polling (and early voting) locations and hours, and more!
Save the Date: 2020 Congress of Counties

2020 is just around the corner. And to kick off your election year, we're excited to officially announce Indiana’s first big political event of 2020 – Congress of Counties 2020!

Save the date in your calendar now:
January 31 – February 1, 2020

The big event will be at the Crowne Plaza Hotel Union Station in downtown Indianapolis.

Congress of Counties is a two-day training event for Indiana's Republican party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists. We’ll hold breakout sessions on topics you’ll want to learn about going into the 2020 elections, along with exciting opportunities to hear from our party’s top Hoosier leaders.

Registration will open soon (keep an eye on your inbox), but the room block at the Crowne Plaza Hotel in downtown Indianapolis is open now! To reserve your room at a special rate of $159, call the Crowne Plaza directly at (317) 631-2221 and mention “Congress of Counties.”

Upcoming Republican Events

October 28 (http://indiana.gop/events/orange-county-fall-dinner-1?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Orange County Fall Dinner
November 1 (http://indiana.gop/events/brown-county-lincoln-day-dinner-1?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
November 1 (http://indiana.gop/events/sullivan-county-fall-dinner-0?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Sullivan County Fall Dinner
November 5: Election Day
November 14 (http://indiana.gop/events/23rd-annual-henry-county-republican-club-speech-contest-high-school-students?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : 23rd Annual Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for HS Students
December 6 (http://indiana.gop/events/greater-indianapolis-republican-womens-club-holiday-luncheon-and-silent-auction?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon and Silent Auction

**Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! **

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb celebrates National Guard's cyber brigade locating in Indiana (https://www.indystar.com/story/news/local/2019/10/22/army-national-guard-cyber-battalion-indiana/4064218002/?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch announces certification of Fountain County property (http://www.wbiw.com/2019/10/23/bell-property-receives-development-designation/?mc_cid=86fcf2ac7c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Young Professionals for Wes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Join us for a free event Happy Hour event with Wesley Hunt

Friend,

We need new leadership in Washington. Congress just isn't getting the job done to preserve our way of life for this generation or the next. The United States has issues that we need to fix now instead of kicking the bucket down the road.

That's why we're inviting you to join us for a Young Professionals Kickoff Happy Hour this Tuesday, October 29th from 6:00pm-7:30pm.

Join us for a drink and discussion on the issues facing Houston, as well as our plan to win back the 7th District.

To RSVP, [click here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=110d2be4feaa41d0bbc297048d25e9eb&_e=TEGHY3n7WpqFcfjkQ-jcxkbfI5F--fMPMYk_0VmUtSwIXvFL49G7yfOLf4x7HbN9yKTtZ95bNdFxqCNgLgeYLJYaB9QVfvTL37KoBU1qvD8WUBCEVbo9kdeukYBxUnMFlUYhOAxc62JTm8tckLlnuBwE3ioYkDiYn8tqjTy_wuZjYScP4gdvqmWKcYpiPeSNDL2-E35dX4XupzmlUyqIZhyrqNWMUgy7br1H9wn923-VIVN6c5vKrtD0arGTpsQroFvCbcdKyYv0DuupVoh_MlVuo2WsJJfwQmeMLQmLXVuRGTqsHUYB_s0d974LX640) or just reply to this message.

Team Hunt

clean_body: I recently read the news and was alarmed to see the liberal media labeling my Senate race as a potential Democratic pick-up. I’ve been working....... Friend, I recently read the news and was alarmed to see the liberal media labeling my Senate race as a potential Democratic pick-up. I’ve been working hard for conservatives in the Senate and produced results - two Supreme Court Justices, new funding for our state and lower taxes for Texans. In the mind of the liberal media, my work to protect conservativism means nothing... so I need your help to spread the word, friend. ** These alarming Washington Post and Dallas Morning News headlines show my team and I one thing: liberals from around the country will now start pouring their money into our state to help flip it blue. You can already see this in the financial records of some of my opponents! They are already being bought by out-of-state interests. Join my team and become a small-dollar patriot today, friend. I am counting on you to help me keep Texas red. -John Cornyn \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, Democrats are piling on to challenge John Cornyn despite his record of putting Texans first and helping President Trump. And now, the mainstream media has begun to chime in, obsessing over the possibility of a blue Texas. “All signs point to another blockbuster Senate battle in Texas.” The Dallas Morning News “Blue Texas is a Democratic dream. Shifting left is a reality” The Washington Post Friend, the truth is that no one supports Texans like John Cornyn does. John Cornyn has delivered billions in aid after the Hurricanes ravaged our state. John Cornyn secured billions in humanitarian aid for the crisis at the border and additional border wall funding. John Cornyn guaranteed the confirmation of Justice Kavanaugh and Justice Gorsuch, creating a conservative majority on the Supreme Court for years to come. ** Keep Texas Red, Team Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

body:
I'll never stop fighting for hope and opportunity all over Kentucky. That's why I'm working as hard as I can to elect Andy Beshear our next governor.
|

| | Peter,

I'll never stop fighting for hope and opportunity all over Kentucky. That's why I'm working as hard as I can to elect Andy Beshear our next governor.

**The election is just 11 days away. This race is so close, and it 's going to take all of us giving it everything we've got to score a huge win. But he needs our help to stay on track to meet his fundraising goals. **[Please, donate now to show your support.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579a0/ad6dc73/144d051c/db7183a/3988989710/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM5NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-rocky?refcode=20191025.1nd__396__&amount=15")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Do you want to retake the Supreme Court from Mitch McConnell?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Before Mitch McConnell broke with every established precedent and constitutional process to block President Obama's final Supreme Court nominee from being confirmed, the Supreme Court recognized the progressive values of our Constitution and country. They upheld women's rights, affirmed gay marriage, and ordered desegregation nationwide. But after McConnell cheated, they have upheld restrictions to abortion, allowed Trump's Muslim ban, and are poised to allow LGBTQ discrimination based on religious beliefs. Now, Trump has cemented a GOP majority on the bench for a generation with his appointments of Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, ensuring that Republicans can have a final say on all of the progressive legislation Democrats are working to enact. Retaking the Senate is now more important than ever \-- if Mitch McConnell and the corrupt Republican Party retains control, they'll block a Democratic president's nomination and keep the courts firmly in their chokehold. We're asking Democrats how important the Supreme Court is to them so we know where the electorate stands and how to shape our 2020 Election Strategy: **Is the future of the Supreme Court important to you when you vote?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc54/6e9863e8/15cd4407/1db08e97/3712778105/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/n9lhsaJk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc54/6e9863e8/15cd4407/1db08e97/3712778105/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/n9lhsaJk") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc54/6e9863e8/15cd4407/1db08e95/3712778105/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191025b.ND-b&refcode2=gjrBVKzMrO6bWOrHWw3x")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

When we say this campaign is all people, no PACs, we mean it. It’s not
some gimmick or catchphrase. It’s the right way of doing things, and the
only way we can truly make sure we put power back into the hands of the
people.

But to be completely honest — it’s not easy. Grassroots fundraising is
hard work, especially when we’re trying to meet a critical deadline (like
we are now to qualify for the November debate). So when we heard that Joe
Biden went back on his no super PACs pledge and decided to encourage
billionaires to form a super PAC to bankroll his campaign — you could say
we were frustrated...and concerned!

Let’s be very clear: super PACs exist so corporations and special
interests can spend unlimited money. And you don’t spend unlimited money
unless you’re hoping to gain influence. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39925?refcode=ema20191025-63539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA ]We’re competing against more
big money than ever before in this race and we need your help so we can
stay competitive in our fundraising. Will you chip in $3
and help us raise $200,000 before the end of the month?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39925?refcode=ema20191025-63539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA ]Contribute $3

We knew that our decision to be a grassroots-funded campaign would make it
difficult for us to financially compete with other candidates.

But we also know that candidates taking money from super PACs undermines
our democracy and hinders us from fighting for real change.

Campaigns don’t give up on their values because they feel confident about
where they’re going. They change course because they’re scared. Scared of
losing, sure, but scared of losing to grassroots-funded campaigns. Yes,
it’s corrosive that billionaires and lobbyists can use super PACs to help
nudge their preferred candidates along. But it’s also saying something:
grassroots donations matter. And they’re working.

We’re fighting to do what it takes to put people — regardless of wealth
and influence — back at the heart of our politics. We’re taking a stand
against the corruption and greed that has influenced our elections.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39925?refcode=ema20191025-63539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA ]Help us win this the right way, and show our competitors how powerful
grassroots donors can be: Chip in $3 or anything you can
now.

We don’t need a super PAC. All we need is you.

– Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39925?refcode=ema20191025-63539&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191025footer&t=1023&refcode2=63539_444211_0YhlCA&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=63539%2E444211%2E0YhlCA

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Fair Fight U
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Today, we're launching Fair Fight U, a network of college chapters engaging students in the fight for free and fair elections. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c74/743381026/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - The consequences of our elections will affect generations to come. That's why it's so important that young people and college students have access to the resources they need to vote. Unfortunately, college students' access to voting is under attack in Georgia, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, Florida, Texas, and across the nation. So we're launching Fair Fight U, a network of college chapters engaging students in the fight for free and fair elections on their campuses and in their communities. But we can't do this work alone. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c75/743381026/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE102519FFU") [**Will you chip in today and b****ecome a founding donor of Fair Fight U to help us ensure every eligible voter, college students included, has access to free and fair elections?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c75/743381026/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE102519FFU") Already, we're working with 14 campus chapters, including Howard University, Morehouse College, and Spelman College. Together, we can protect the right to vote for generations to come. \- Team Fair Fight
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c72/743381026/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c73/743381026/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57c/34a064cc/1b242128/7037c70/743381026/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

clean_body: Today, we're launching Fair Fight U, a network of college chapters engaging students in the fight for free and fair elections. | "" | | | Friend - The consequences of our elections will affect generations to come. That's why it's so important that young people and college students have access to the resources they need to vote. Unfortunately, college students' access to voting is under attack in Georgia, New Hampshire, Wisconsin, Florida, Texas, and across the nation. So we're launching Fair Fight U, a network of college chapters engaging students in the fight for free and fair elections on their campuses and in their communities. But we can't do this work alone. "" "" Already, we're working with 14 campus chapters, including Howard University, Morehouse College, and Spelman College. Together, we can protect the right to vote for generations to come. \- Team Fair Fight | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2019 Fair Fight PAC, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfbd/3eb3e2fc/5560fb8f/744da7f8/1821815098/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Tina Smith
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME]: Stop Robocalls 📵
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We all have received these robocalls, but now it's time for Congress to get legislation across the finish line. Add your name to stop the scam calls >>

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

How many robocalls have you received this week?

These calls are more than just a nuisance, they're the start of being involved with a scam. They are harmful, and there's no question: We need to be doing more to stop these calls.

Both the Senate and the House have passed bills to crack down on these harassing calls, and now we need to get legislation enacted into law to shed light on who these callers are, and hold them accountable for their actions.

**I want these calls to stop as much as you do, and I need your help to make that happen.**

**[Friend, I'm counting on you to be one of the voices we need urging Congress to crack down on robocalls. Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41989/c1f7015/6723cf27/1145156c/2507818072/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&&")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41989/c1f7015/6723cf27/1145156d/2507818072/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&")** **We can make scammers think twice before making a dial. But we need to make sure that legislation is enacted into law.**

**[It's time to take action against fraudulent callers. Will you join me in calling for Congress to get legislation done?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41989/c1f7015/6723cf27/1145156d/2507818072/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stop-scam-robocalls/smith?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full&")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191025robocalls2-full-biobox&amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41989/c1f7015/6723cf27/1145156f/2507818072/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 stories President Trump doesn’t want you to miss
body:
"President Trump announced Wednesday that an agreement to a permanent ceasefire has been reached that will suspend Turkish military operations..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08670797bd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Announces Permanent Ceasefire in Syria and Will Release Turkey from Sanctions**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=07f07b7e06&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“President Trump announced Wednesday that an agreement to a permanent ceasefire has been reached that will suspend Turkish military operations in northern Syria,” Ellie Bufkin reports. The President underscored his belief that America should stay away from costly, endless foreign wars: “The job of our military is not to police the world.”

** ****President Trump:**[After 8 years of failed regime change, it’s time to come home.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c9e4fe119&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Behold the Lord High Impeacher](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32f0eee669&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Under today’s process, [Adam] Schiff gets to make up the rules as he goes along. Behold the Lord High Impeacher. Democrats view control over the narrative as essential, having learned from their Russia-collusion escapade the perils of transparency,” Kimberly Strassel writes. “Democrats’ barring of Republicans and the White House from this ‘fact finding’ stage ensures what is presented later will be a one-sided narrative.”

**NEW:** [“Whistleblower acknowledged additional element of potential anti-Trump bias”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99a87f849f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Melania Trump Makes First Solo Visit to Capitol Hill**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aadf451c2f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“First lady Melania Trump embarked on her first solo visit to Capitol Hill Wednesday to discuss the opioid crisis with a bipartisan group of lawmakers,” Marina Pitofsky reports. “The event marked the one-year anniversary of the signing of the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act,” which funds training and care to combat America’s opioid crisis.

**In photos** : [The First Lady visits the halls of Congress.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e7a1efdb2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**It's a Middle-Class Boom -- How Americans are Really Doing Under Trump Economy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b39ec282f0&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“The median or average-income family has seen a gain of $5,003 since Trump came into office,” Steve Moore writes. “Under George W. Bush, the household income gains were a little over $400 in eight years, and under Barack Obama the gains were $1,043. That was in eight years for each. Under Trump, in less than three years, the extra income is about three times larger.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Touts Jobs, Industry at Marcellus Shale Conference in Pittsburgh**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4388850fe2&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Pittsburgh Tribune-Review_
Hours after President Trump announced that Turkey had agreed to a major ceasefire in Syria, he headed to Pittsburgh to address an industry conference on shale energy. Under the Trump Administration, America has become the “greatest energy superpower in the history of the world,” with both U.S. oil and natural gas production leading the globe.

**🎬****President Trump:** [“I will never stop fighting for you.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f37a4bbd7&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Josh Mahony
subject: We can't abandon our allies
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
A full withdrawal from Syria is irresponsible

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191025syria&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

Trump's decision to abandon our Kurdish allies and pull U.S. troops out of Syria has been a disaster. Turkey has already launched an offensive attack against the Kurds. As if that wasn't enough, Trump's reckless move created a power vacuum in the Middle East -- giving his buddy Putin more power than ever.

**This president has no business setting foreign policy. He 's getting people killed, and he's destabilizing strategic regions of the world.**

And as we'd expect from any decent U.S. Senator, Tom Cotton called Trump out for this, right? Wrong.

**Stand with me in demanding that Tom Cotton stand up to Trump 's careless military strategy. **

**[We need 5,000 signatures TODAY to send a message to Tom Cotton that pulling out of Syria and abandoning our allies was a terrible decision. Will you add your name right now?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://mahony.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-demand-we-stand-by-our-allies?refcode=em191025syria&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://mahony.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-demand-we-stand-by-our-allies?refcode=em191025syria&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,

Josh Mahony

** **
---
| | Josh Mahony is a native Arkansan, non-profit leader and a long-time business owner. He's running to replace Tom Cotton and make sure everyday Arkansans have a voice in the Senate. If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191025syria&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Fayetteville, AR 72702

| Team: Since Ed reached out this morning, we've had a surge of online donations, and now we're only 10% away from reaching our goal. _**[With just a few hours before the deadline, will you rush $27 or more and help us close the gap and keep Ed in the fight for our values?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102519_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
> I just got an urgent update from my team. We're just over 75% of the way to reaching this week's goal. But with our deadline at midnight, we're in danger of not reaching it in time.
>
> [](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102519_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
> But if we can rally today and bring in 185 more donations, we'll make our goal before midnight.
>

name: Team Beto
subject: A note on the DNC’s requirements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We just got an updated list of who has qualified for the November debate
and wanted to share it with you. Out of the top nine candidates in this
race, only one has NOT yet qualified.

Take a look at which of the nine have met the DNC’s requirements:

✅Joe Biden
✅Elizabeth Warren
✅Bernie Sanders
✅Pete Buttigieg
✅Kamala Harris
✅Andrew Yang
❌Beto O’Rourke
✅Amy Klobuchar
✅Cory Booker

We can’t let this slide. To state the obvious, we need to get Beto on the
debate stage. And we can’t just wait and hope for the best — we have to
take this into our own hands. That’s why we’ve put together an aggressive
grassroots plan to make it happen. But our ability to carry out each part
of this plan depends entirely on how much we raise this week. The less we
raise, the more we have to cut from the plan. The more we raise, the more
work we can do.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39906?refcode=ema20191025-63580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=63580%2E444211%2EQFXq15 ]Will you chip in $3 and prove that Beto deserves to be
on that debate stage? Every dollar you pitch in today will go towards
running a robust campaign that ensures we do everything possible to
qualify for debates.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39906?refcode=ema20191025-63580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=63580%2E444211%2EQFXq15 ]Contribute $3

Candidates have until one week before the debate to qualify so we’re
starting to run short on time. That’s why we’ve been putting together a
plan that combines proven strategies from throughout our entire campaign
–– from organizing on the ground everywhere and running digital ads online
to getting our message out to as many voters as possible.

At the end of the day today, we’ll decide which of the ideas we can afford
to do and which we have to say no to for the week ahead. Since we’re a
grassroots campaign that’s powered 100% by people, we can’t rely on big
PACs, corporations, lobbyists, or special interests to come in at the last
second and get Beto over the line. It’s on us, every single one of us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39906?refcode=ema20191025-63580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=63580%2E444211%2EQFXq15 ]Will you rush $3 and help fight for Beto’s place on the
November debate stage? Every dollar counts as we do everything possible to
meet the DNC’s requirements.

Thanks for all you do,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39906?refcode=ema20191025-63580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=63580%2E444211%2EQFXq15 ]Contribute

name: Yang2020
subject: The DNC just raised the stakes -- making our goal even more important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We must now hit higher polling thresholds to qualify and get Andrew’s voice on the stage.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2166%2E377263%2Et3DUg_) Yang Gang --

This morning it was announced that the DNC has raised the stakes for the December debate.

We must now hit higher polling thresholds to qualify and get Andrew’s voice on the stage.

That makes hitting this October end-of-month goal even more important. We must go up with ads in the early states if we’re going to qualify for this debate.

**Can you make your first contribution now when it matters most? We only have 6 days to hit this goal and we’re still $1,084,626 away.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15120?t=5&akid=2166%2E377263%2Et3DUg_)
---
Andrew’s counting on all of us to get him on that stage. And we can’t stress enough how important this debate will be.

Voters from across the country will be tuning in and making their final choices about who to support. What we do now will be the difference -- please make a contribution of $5 or more now: **[https://act.yang2020.com/go/October-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15120?t=7)**

Let’s do this.

Yang2020
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15120?t=6&akid=2166%2E377263%2Et3DUg_)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2166%2E377263%2Et3DUg_) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2166%2E377263%2Et3DUg_) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
